template:
IN THE HIGH COURT OF JUDICATURE AT BOMBAY

[court]

[party_name] ................................................. Petitioner / Appellant

                                  VERSUS

[respondent_name] ........................................... Respondent

                              VAKALATNAMA

I, [party_name], son/daughter/wife of [parent_name], aged about [age] years, Indian inhabitant, residing at [address], do hereby appoint and retain Advocate [advocate_name], enrolled with the Bar Council of Maharashtra & Goa under Sanad No. [bar_no], to appear, act, plead and conduct on my behalf the above matter in this Hon'ble High Court.

I authorise the said Advocate to:

  (a) Sign, verify, file and present all pleadings, applications, affidavits, petitions, written statements, replies, rejoinders, compilations and other documents;
  (b) Receive notices, summonses and orders;
  (c) Draw and receive any monies, cheques, refunds or process fees lying to my credit and grant valid receipts therefor;
  (d) Engage Senior Counsel or other Advocates whose fees shall be borne by me;
  (e) Settle, compromise, withdraw or refer the matter to arbitration with my written instructions;
  (f) Do all such acts as the said Advocate may consider necessary in the conduct of the matter.

I undertake to ratify all acts done by the said Advocate in pursuance of this authority and to bear all costs and fees as may be agreed.

Dated this ____ day of __________, 20___ at [city].


_________________________                                _________________________
  Client                                                  Accepted
  [party_name]                                            [advocate_name]
                                                          Enr. No. [bar_no]

IN THE COURT OF [court]
AT [city], DELHI

[party_name] ................................................. Plaintiff / Applicant

                                  VERSUS

[respondent_name] ........................................... Defendant / Respondent

                              VAKALATNAMA

Know all men by these presents that I, [party_name], son/daughter/wife of [parent_name], aged about [age] years, resident of [address], do hereby retain and appoint Advocate [advocate_name], enrolled with the Bar Council of Delhi vide Registration No. [bar_no], to be my counsel in the above matter and to conduct the same on my behalf.

The said Advocate shall have full authority to:

  1. Appear, plead, act and prosecute or defend the said matter and any application, appeal, revision or execution arising therefrom;
  2. Sign, verify and present plaints, written statements, replications, applications, affidavits, vakalatnamas, memos of appeal and other documents necessary for the conduct of the case;
  3. Receive on my behalf any sum of money, decretal amount, refund of court fee or other process fees and give valid receipt therefor;
  4. Compromise, withdraw or refer the matter to arbitration only on my express written instructions;
  5. Engage another Advocate or Senior Counsel, whose fees shall be borne by me;
  6. Take all such steps as the said Advocate may deem necessary in the conduct of the case.

I agree to ratify all acts done by the said Advocate in pursuance hereof and shall be bound by the same.

Dated at [city] this ____ day of __________, 20___.


_________________________                                _________________________
  Signature of Party                                      Accepted
  [party_name]                                            [advocate_name]
                                                          Bar Council of Delhi
                                                          Enr. No. [bar_no]

IN THE SUPREME COURT OF INDIA
[court]

[party_name] ................................................. Petitioner / Appellant

                                  VERSUS

[respondent_name] ........................................... Respondent

                              VAKALATNAMA

I, [party_name], son/daughter/wife of [parent_name], aged about [age] years, resident of [address], do hereby appoint and retain Advocate-on-Record [advocate_name], enrolled with the Bar Council of India under Registration No. [bar_no], to appear, act and plead for me in the above proceeding before this Hon'ble Court.

The said Advocate-on-Record is authorised to:

  (a) File, sign, verify and present all petitions, applications, affidavits, replies and other documents in the above matter and in any connected, interlocutory or consequential proceeding;
  (b) Receive notices, summons, orders and process from this Hon'ble Court on my behalf;
  (c) Engage Senior Advocates and other Counsel whose fees and expenses I undertake to bear;
  (d) Withdraw, compromise or refer the matter to mediation/arbitration only with my written consent;
  (e) Receive any monies, refunds, costs or process fees payable to me and grant valid discharge therefor;
  (f) Do all such acts and things as may be necessary or expedient in the conduct of the matter.

I hereby ratify and confirm all acts done by the said Advocate-on-Record in pursuance of this authority.

Dated at [city] this ____ day of __________, 20___.


_________________________                                _________________________
  Petitioner / Appellant                                  Accepted
  [party_name]                                            [advocate_name]
                                                          Advocate-on-Record
                                                          Code/Enr. No. [bar_no]

IN THE COURT OF [court]
AT [city], KARNATAKA

[party_name] ................................................. Plaintiff / Petitioner

                                  VERSUS

[respondent_name] ........................................... Defendant / Respondent

                              VAKALATNAMA

Know all men by these presents that I, [party_name], son/daughter/wife of [parent_name], aged about [age] years, residing at [address], do hereby nominate and appoint Advocate [advocate_name], enrolled with the Karnataka State Bar Council under Registration No. [bar_no], to be my advocate in the above proceeding.

The said Advocate is authorised to:

  1. Appear, act, plead and prosecute or defend the above suit, application or appeal and any proceeding ancillary thereto;
  2. Sign, verify, file or take back any plaint, written statement, application, affidavit, vakalatnama, memo or document;
  3. Receive notices, summons and process on my behalf;
  4. Engage any other Advocate or Senior Counsel whose fees shall be borne by me;
  5. Withdraw, compromise or refer the matter to arbitration only with my written consent;
  6. Receive any sums of money, costs, refunds, decretal amount and grant valid receipt therefor;
  7. Do all such acts as the said Advocate deems necessary in the conduct of the proceeding.

I hereby ratify and confirm all acts done by the said Advocate in pursuance hereof.

Dated at [city] this ____ day of __________, 20___.


_________________________                                _________________________
  Client                                                  Accepted
  [party_name]                                            [advocate_name]
                                                          KSBC Enr. No. [bar_no]

IN THE COURT OF [court]
AT [city], TAMIL NADU

[party_name] ................................................. Plaintiff / Petitioner

                                  VERSUS

[respondent_name] ........................................... Defendant / Respondent

                              VAKALATNAMA

I, [party_name], son/daughter/wife of [parent_name], aged about [age] years, residing at [address], do hereby retain and appoint Advocate [advocate_name], enrolled with the Bar Council of Tamil Nadu and Puducherry under Registration No. [bar_no], to be my Advocate in the above proceeding and to do all acts incidental to the conduct of the same.

The said Advocate shall have authority to:

  (a) Appear, act, plead, sign, file and present pleadings, applications, affidavits and documents on my behalf;
  (b) Receive notices, summonses, orders and processes;
  (c) Withdraw, compromise or refer the matter to arbitration only on my written instructions;
  (d) Engage other Advocates or Counsel whose fees I undertake to bear;
  (e) Receive sums of money payable to me by way of decree, refund or otherwise, and grant valid receipts;
  (f) Do all such other acts as may be necessary in the conduct of the case.

I hereby agree to be bound by and ratify all acts done by the said Advocate in pursuance of this authority.

Dated at [city] this ____ day of __________, 20___.


_________________________                                _________________________
  Party                                                   Accepted
  [party_name]                                            [advocate_name]
                                                          Enr. No. [bar_no]
